name: Last Z Survival Shooter
description: Ready for an all-out apocalypse escape? Last Z: Survival Shooter throws you straight into a world overrun by zombies. Zombies attack from every direction. Keep moving, dodge smartly, and never stop running. Shoot the digital doors to gain more helpers or boost your attack speed, etc. Use your strategy to choose which digital door to go through.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
